allow: PowerShell(Remove-Item f:\\Monopoly\\public\\logo-test.html -Confirm:$false; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "killed monopoly server pid $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "no server on 4000" })

PowerShell($d='f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\sounds'; Rename-Item "$d\\dice roll.mp3" 'dice.mp3'; Rename-Item "$d\\dragon-studio-cash-register.mp3" 'cash.mp3'; Rename-Item "$d\\dragon-studio-door-slam-478362.mp3" 'jail.mp3'; Rename-Item "$d\\win fanfare.mp3" 'win.mp3'; Rename-Item 'f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\fonts\\Kabel-Heavy.ttf' 'kabel.ttf'; Get-ChildItem $d, f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\fonts | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($s = Get-Content f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\monopoly-logo-red.svg -Raw; $s = $s -replace 'viewBox="114 133 855 222"', 'viewBox="114 212 855 143"' -replace '<svg width="855" height="222"', '<svg width="855" height="143"'; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\('f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\monopoly-logo-banner.svg', $s\); 'ok')

PowerShell($s = Get-Content f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\monopoly-logo-banner.svg -Raw; $s = $s.Replace\('<g id="Monopoly Man">', '<g id="Monopoly Man" display="none">'\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\('f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\monopoly-logo-banner.svg', $s\); 'ok')
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "already running \(pid $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "not running" })

PowerShell($t='f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\tiles'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $t | Out-Null; $b='f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\board boxs\\Monopoly Kit \(Community\) \(Copy\)'; Copy-Item "$b\\Corner.svg" "$t\\corner-go.svg"; Copy-Item "$b \(1\)\\Corner.svg" "$t\\corner-gotojail.svg"; Copy-Item "$b \(2\)\\Corner.svg" "$t\\corner-parking.svg"; Copy-Item "$b \(3\)\\Corner.svg" "$t\\corner-jail.svg"; Copy-Item "$b\\Action.svg" "$t\\tile-chance-pink.svg"; Copy-Item "$b \(2\)\\Action.svg" "$t\\tile-chance-blue.svg"; Copy-Item "$b\\Action-2.svg" "$t\\tile-chest.svg"; \(Get-ChildItem $t\).Name)
PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\extracted -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Get-ChildItem f:\\Monopoly\\assets\\tiles | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($f='f:\\Monopoly\\shared\\data.js'; $s=[IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f\); $s=$s.Replace\('Advance to Illinois Avenue','Advance to Trafalgar Square'\).Replace\('Advance to St. Charles Place','Advance to Pall Mall'\).Replace\('Take a trip to Reading Railroad','Take a trip to King''s Cross Station'\).Replace\('Take a walk on the Boardwalk. Advance token to Boardwalk.','Advance to Mayfair.'\); $m=[regex]::Matches\($s,'\\$'\); "dollar signs: $\($m.Count\)"; $s=$s -replace '\\$','£'; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f,$s,\(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); 'saved')
